title: Supplementaries 3D Doors and Trapdoors
description: 3D gold/netherite door and trapdoor models for Supplementaries
body:
# Overview

This resourcepack makes [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) gold and netherite doors and trapdoors 3D.

For vanilla 3D doors and trapdoors, please download it from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) in the 3D section.

![3D Netherite Door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmA4zPfX/images/7faa63fb59c48714786e8e5f81a5ccfee0b18b82.webp)

![3D Netherite Trapdoor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XmA4zPfX/images/7acfef898f6eba029ffab638044d834460c33237.png)

Check out similar projects here: https://modrinth.com/collection/N35iau5q

# Credits
- [Stridey](https://modrinth.com/user/31j7L936) and Vanilla Tweaks for the inspiration from their vanilla 3D doors and trapdoor models
- Supplementaries: https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries
